keys.description: A unique identifier for the bundle, in reverse-DNS format.
A short display name for the bundle.
The user-visible name of the bundle.
The name of the bundle's executable file.
The build version number of the bundle.
The release (marketing) version number of the bundle.
The type of the bundle (e.g. APPL, FMWK, BNDL).
The version of the Info.plist format.
The default language and region for the bundle.
The name of the bundle's icon file.
The document types supported by the app.
The URL schemes supported by the app.
The minimum operating system version required to run the app.
The App Store category of the app.
Whether the app runs as an agent without a Dock icon.
A human-readable copyright notice.
The name of the bundle's principal class.
The name of the app's main storyboard file.
The name of the launch screen storyboard.
App Transport Security configuration.
Why the app needs access to the camera.
Why the app needs access to the microphone.
Why the app needs location access while in use.
